description: Tenant-owned spans-only DQL mapping from observed application calls to Forward dependency candidates

ProfileStatus.description: Only enabled profiles are available to the app

ProfileSelection.description: Mark one enabled profile as the tenant default

name.description: Operator-visible label for this application and environment mapping

constraints.customMessage: Name must be between 1 and 100 characters

description.description: Application, environment, and ownership scope covered by the query

constraints.customMessage: Description must be no longer than 500 characters

selection.description: Use Default for exactly one enabled profile

query.description: Reviewed query beginning with fetch spans and returning the documented canonical dependency and evidence fields

constraints.customMessage: Query must be between 1 and 5000 characters

query.default:
fetch spans, from: now()-15m
| filter span.kind == "client"
| fieldsAdd `dependency.id` = trace.id, `app.name` = "review-required", `app.environment` = "review-required", `dt.entity.service` = dt.smartscape.service, `service.name` = service.name, `network.source` = client.address, `network.destination` = server.address, `network.protocol` = network.transport, `network.port` = server.port, `owner.team` = "review-required", criticality = "medium", `dependency.confidence` = 0, `dependency.mapping_state` = "review", `dependency.observed_at` = start_time, `dependency.evidence_source` = "dynatrace-live-spans"
| fields `dependency.id`, `app.name`, `app.environment`, `dt.entity.service`, `service.name`, `network.source`, `network.destination`, `network.protocol`, `network.port`, `owner.team`, criticality, `dependency.confidence`, `dependency.mapping_state`, `dependency.observed_at`, `dependency.evidence_source`
| limit 100

maxResultRecords.description: Bounded query result limit from 1 through 1000

constraints.customMessage: Maximum result records must be an integer from 1 through 1000

maxEvidenceAgeMinutes.description: Rows older than this fail closed; allowed range is 1 through 1440

constraints.customMessage: Maximum evidence age must be an integer from 1 through 1440

schemaConstraints.customMessage: A dependency discovery profile with the same name already exists
